description: You are a genetic counseling student creating educational materials. Create a 4-generation genetic pedigree chart of Queen Victoria's hemophilia lineage in draw.io using the data provided in '~/Desktop/pedigree_data.txt' and following the notation rules in '~/Desktop/pedigree_conventions.txt'. The chart must include all individuals across 4 generations starting with Victoria and Albert, using standard pedigree symbols and visual encoding for unaffected, affected, and carrier statuses. Include generation numbers (I-IV), names for key individuals, and a legend explaining the symbols used. Save the diagram to '~/Diagrams/royal_hemophilia_pedigree.drawio' and export it as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/royal_hemophilia_pedigree.pdf'.
